mcps.name: Ask My Human
mcps.description: When an agent is uncertain or needs clarification, it can ask a human for guidance. Sends an event and waits for a follow-up answer before proceeding.

tools.name: ask_human
tools.description: Ask a human a question and wait for their response. Use when uncertain about requirements, edge cases, or decisions that need human judgment.

tools.name: check_response
tools.description: Check if a human has responded to a pending question

resources.name: Pending Questions
resources.description: List of questions awaiting human response

mcps.name: Pass to Expert
mcps.description: Delegate tasks to specialized agents. When one agent knows another is better suited for a task (like git operations, code review, or specific domains), it can hand off work instead of attempting it poorly.

tools.name: delegate_to_expert
tools.description: Delegate a task to a specialized agent/expert. Returns when the expert completes the task.

tools.name: list_experts
tools.description: List available expert agents and their capabilities

tools.name: register_expertise
tools.description: Register this agent's expertise so others can delegate to it

resources.name: Expert Registry
resources.description: Registry of available experts and their capabilities

mcps.name: Events
mcps.description: Emit and subscribe to events for observability and coordination. Includes regular check-ins to allow humans to change direction or provide new instructions mid-task.

tools.name: emit_event
tools.description: Emit an event to notify other agents or humans of something that happened

tools.name: checkin
tools.description: Regular check-in to see if there are new instructions or direction changes. Call this periodically during long-running tasks.

tools.name: subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to events matching a pattern

mcps.name: MCP Gateway
mcps.description: Central gateway that routes all MCP requests. Provides unified authentication, logging, and routing for all MCPs in the system.

tools.name: route
tools.description: Route a request to an MCP through the gateway

tools.name: list_mcps
tools.description: List all MCPs available through the gateway
